tips.title: GO Outdoors support this badge.
tips.details: Find out more about the [support offered by GO Outdoors](/supporters/go-outdoors/).

tips.title: Hiking can be adapted for everyone. There are easy access routes in National Parks, and The Outdoor Guide also has information about wheelchair accessible routes.
tips.details: Find out about [easy access routes in National Parks](https://www.nationalparks.uk/accessibility/). The Outdoor Guide has information about [wheelchair friendly walks](https://theoutdoorguide.co.uk/walking-routes/accessible/).

tips.title: Hikes or journeys you've taken part in for previous stages of the badge can be counted towards your total as you move through the sections.
